goal: Audit the next safe live Builder integration path without adding any live call, secret, persistence, or runtime integration.
claims: The audit identifies the safest first live Builder path as read-only evidence/task/audit access, not execution or write.
The audit lists prerequisites before any live call can be implemented.
The audit explicitly blocks live writes, execute/run, push, merge, deploy, persistence, and secrets in the current line.
assumptions: Donor availability is based only on existing Bluepilot donor docs, not fresh Builder repo inspection.
No live call can be added without a later contract and human review.
No runtime, package, tool, or example change is required.
dod: The audit identifies allowed first read-only path, blocked paths, prerequisites, evidence needs, and BP-021 recommendation.
stop_conditions: Secret, API key, persistence, execute/run, push, merge, or deploy behavior becomes necessary
prior_task_findings: BP-019 kept persistence disabled and recommended a live-builder-readiness audit before any live call or persistence contract.
